articles.title: Rahul writes to PM Modi, seeks Bharat Ratna for BSP founder Kanshi Ram
articles.description: As we commemorate the birth anniversary of Kanshi Ramji today and reflect on his legacy and contributions, I write with a request that he be awarded the Bharat Ratna posthumously, says Congress leader Rahul Gandhi

articles.title: Rahul Gandhi demands Bharat Ratna for Kanshi Ram, writes to PM Modi as Dalit outreach peaks ahead of UP polls
articles.description: Move comes as part of Congress outreach to Dalits and other socially backward sections ahead of Uttar Pradesh elections due within a year

articles.title: Jal Jeevan Mission: Cabinet nod to Kerala Water Authority for availing ₹4,000 crore more as loan from NABARD
articles.description: Amount constitutes the second instalment of a ₹9,000-crore loan assistance that is being secured under the NABARD Infrastructure Development Assistance  scheme for Jal Jeevan Mission

articles.description: Is Vaibhav Sooryavanshi riding on luck ExIndia star predicts tougher IPL

articles.title: Israeli forces kill Palestinian couple and two of their children in occupied West Bank
articles.description: Mohammed, aged five, and Othman, aged seven, were killed alongside their parents, the Palestinian health ministry says.

articles.title: West Asia war could hit India's gems, jewellery exports by $1.2 bn: GJEPC - Business Standard
articles.description: West Asia war could hit India's gems, jewellery exports by $1.2 bn: GJEPC  Business Standard

articles.title: Trump's personal number is up for sale, report says - and CEOs, crypto investors are paying to get it
articles.description: Donald Trump's personal mobile number has become Washington DC's most traded commodity, with CEOs offering cash and crypto investors offering cryptocurrency to obtain it, according to an investigation by The Atlantic.

topStories.description: Robert Frost's famous lines about choosing the unconventional path resonate in today's world, where social media trends dictate lifestyles. The poem emphasizes that choices shape our identity.

dailyNews.title: CBSE cancels all Class 12 board exams in the Middle East amid US-Iran war
dailyNews.description: CBSE had already announced the cancellation of all Class 10 Board exams in the region and had rescheduled the Class 12 exams scheduled till March 16.

dailyNews.title: Restaurants revive retro pricing for anniversaries — but does the trend make ‘cents’?
dailyNews.description: Restaurants nationwide celebrate anniversaries with throwback pricing promotions, offering everything from $1.65 fries to $3.50 pizzas for limited times.

dailyNews.title: Former college volleyball star Kaylie Ray opens up on viral clash with Arizona Democrat senator
dailyNews.description: Former Utah State volleyball player Kaylie Ray confronted Arizona senator Catherine Miranda after the senator questioned Ray's competitiveness during a hearing.

dailyNews.title: 11-year-old accused of premeditated murder in brother’s death can’t be tried as adult, former DA says
dailyNews.description: Shocking homicide case rocks Colorado community as 11-year-old accused of killing younger brother. Juvenile justice system faces rare legal challenge.

dailyNews.title: American Culture Quiz: Test yourself on tipping turmoil and burger buzz
dailyNews.description: The American Culture Quiz is a weekly test of our national traits, trends, history and people. This time, test your knowledge of tipping turmoil, burger buzz and more.

dailyNews.title: Chinese fishing 'militia' formations signal rising gray-zone pressure on Taiwan
dailyNews.description: China's maritime militia allegedly deployed over 2,000 fishing boats in coordinated formations near Taiwan, raising significant security concerns among analysts.

dailyNews.title: Kate Middleton reveals she rarely drinks alcohol after her cancer diagnosis during brewery visit: reports
dailyNews.description: Kate Middleton admitted that she rarely drinks alcohol since her cancer diagnosis two years ago during a London brewery tour with Prince William on Thursday, according to reports.

dailyNews.title: Japan suffers shocking collapse to Venezuela in World Baseball Classic
dailyNews.description: Japan's World Baseball Classic title defense ends with 8-5 quarterfinal loss to Venezuela as Shohei Ohtani and defending champions fall short of semifinals.

dailyNews.title: State Department urges Americans to leave Middle East as airspace closures disrupt travel
dailyNews.description: Americans traveling in Dubai and Israel recount missile alerts, canceled flights and sheltering during regional conflict as the State Department urges citizens to leave.

dailyNews.title: Exiled Iranian crown prince says he’s ready to lead Iran ‘as soon as the Islamic Republic falls’
dailyNews.description: Exiled Iranian Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi says he's ready to lead Iran's transition as conflict enters third week and regime faces potential collapse.

dailyNews.title: Kim Jong Un appears with teenage daughter at live-fire rocket test in North Korea
dailyNews.description: Kim Jong Un's daughter joins him at missile test, fueling ongoing succession speculation as North Korea escalates weapons demonstrations amid regional tensions.

topStories.title: Son of British couple detained in Iran 'let down' by Starmer's leadership on parent's imprisonment amid war
topStories.description: The son of British prisoners in Iran slammed U.K. Prime Minister Keir Starmer's "non-existent" advocacy and urged President Donald Trump to remember prisoners during strikes on Iran.

topStories.title: For Trump, a Promised Economic Boom Collides With the Costs of War
topStories.description: President Trump had envisioned a growing economy and improving fortunes for American families in 2026. That appears at risk in his war with Iran.

topStories.title: F.C.C. Chair Threatens to Revoke Broadcasters’ Licenses Over War Coverage

topStories.title: Trump Administration Turns to Migrant Workers to Help Farm Labor Shortage
topStories.description: As the president’s immigration policies squeeze an already tight supply of farm labor, the Trump administration is making it cheaper to hire foreign farmworkers.

topStories.title: How Minnesota Beat Trump
topStories.description: Moms donating their breast milk to strangers, dads taking someone else’s kids to school: Minnesotans showed a basic human impulse to look out for their neighbors.

topStories.description: President Trump said that other countries would join the U.S. in sending warships to the Strait of Hormuz, but did not share more specifics.

topStories.description: TSA officers faced their first full missed paycheck Friday.

topStories.description: In an exclusive interview with CBS News Saturday, Federal Communications Chair Brendan Carr doubled down on his warning that broadcast licenses could be revoked amid President Trump's criticisms of media coverage of the war in Iran.

dailyNews.title: Trump says there’s been ‘total obliteration’ of Iran militarily
dailyNews.description: President Trump told NBC News’ Kristen Welker in a nearly half hour phone conversation that Iran has been “militarily defeated” and he believes other countries will help to secure passage through the Strait of Hormuz.
